purpose_cn: Codex S 自己的 Seed Cortex 执行面合同岛；无当前用户 Grok 包时，旧 Grok 合同只作对齐参考；当前用户 Grok 包出现时，它是用户唯一权威代理，高于本地、repo、runtime、desktop authority。

task_scoped_verifier.role: focused verifier or pytest target for the artifact being accepted

run_only_for: task asks for full route verification

legacy_compatibility.scope: old CLEAN-runtime, B/5d33, old lifecycle hook, old completion-gate, old projection verifiers

identity_boundary.identity_cn: 这是新建的 Codex S Seed Cortex 执行身份，不是旧 A/B/C/D 身份的别名。

user_speech_alias.note_cn: 用户口语 A = 当前 S 执行面；除非用户明确 legacy/旧 A

identity_boundary.allowed_legacy_use: reference_only via Legacy5d33Adapter or explicit compatibility/migration/incident replay

hook_boundary.role: S-scoped Stop guard plus fail-open two-layer continuation audit: live backend/output-growth watch first, source-anchor gap continuation second; blocks fake completion/stop wording, not discussion/search/repair/delegation

legacy_global_managed_hook_freeze.reason: Old global managed lifecycle/UCP/completion hook is frozen as backup only; it must not control Seed Cortex S sessions.
must_not_delegate_to: old UserPromptSubmit / PreToolUse / PermissionRequest / Stop gates

progress_truth_contract.question_cn: 用户是否多了一件不用懂英文也能感到有用的东西？
true_progress_requires: E-drive diff or registered usable capability
real provider/tool/API invocation or durable workflow step
Chinese readback saying what can be done now
not_progress_by_itself: worker PASS or pytest PASS without artifact acceptance

boundary_cn: 验证通过不是默认生效。
API/CLI/verifier 可调用不是 hook/runtime 强制执行。
默认主循环触发候选已验证不是 runtime 强制执行。
默认可发现不是 runtime 强制执行。
runtime 强制执行才是真正机器生效。

state_meaning_cn.candidate_registered: 只是登记为候选能力/未来 frontier；后续 AI 可能看到，但不会默认执行。
state_meaning_cn.verifier_ready_but_not_hooked: 已有 schema/test/verifier/latest/readback，但还没接进默认热路径或真实触发点。
state_meaning_cn.api_cli_verifier_ready_not_hook_enforced: service/API/CLI/verifier 可调用并能写 evidence/readback，但还没有被 hook/runtime/graph 按默认触发路径强制调用。
state_meaning_cn.runtime_trigger_candidate_verifier_ready: 默认主执行循环触发候选的 schema/verifier/readback 和 service refs 已就绪；它不是 Stop guard、completion gate 或 runtime 强制执行。
state_meaning_cn.default_hot_path_ready: L0 / must-read / 合同岛能默认发现，并写清触发点、latest 路径、verifier 命令和中文 readback；后续窗口默认应知道它，但仍不等于真实 hook/runtime 强制执行。
state_meaning_cn.runtime_enforced: 真实 hook/runtime/graph/entrypoint 已强制调用，并且 verifier 能证明触发路径有效。

return_target_order: next highest-EV machine action from runtime refs

situation_and_intent_object_recall.root_intent_333_role: global isomorphism command plus current new-system extension binding for L0 + SessionStart + contract island + spec mirror
situation_and_intent_object_recall.root_intent_333_meaning_cn: 333 是新系统全局同构口令：角色、循环 owner、宽度 owner、记忆、意图五条同一形状；当前扩展绑定 AUTHORITY_READ_ORDER、20260701/20260702 总稿、work_id、Codex S 和 D 盘证据。333 不是用户完成裁决者，也不是 5d33 控制面；但它约束执行形状，禁止一轮 closure/PASS/报告/readback 当停点、禁止 loop 与 width 各飞、禁止 provider_probe bulk 冒充成熟 DP 进展。

root_intent_333_global_isomorphism_five.roles: user -> grok preserve/supervise -> execution brain dispatch -> durable owner continue -> mature workers execute; DP is worker pool, not second brain
root_intent_333_global_isomorphism_five.loop_owner: RootIntentLoop while: restore -> dispatch -> poll -> fan-in -> acceptance -> Chinese readback -> next wave
root_intent_333_global_isomorphism_five.width_owner: frontier portfolio + mature router/provider headroom + DP model modes decide width in the same topology
root_intent_333_global_isomorphism_five.memory: durable runtime records plus task-bound disk evidence; chat, PASS, latest, and reports are not completion
root_intent_333_global_isomorphism_five.intent: isomorphic-expand-only; forbid shrink, object swap, and micro-wave as main chain

forbidden_defaults: CodexWorkspaces\A as Seed Cortex code cwd
old physical git-root folder label as Codex TUI top-left label when S entry is active
B lifecycle hooks as Seed Cortex mainline
old or non-current Grok bridge contract as Codex S source of truth
worker PASS, report, latest.json, or sidecar fanout as completion
old D:\XINAO_CLEAN_RUNTIME codex_l0_bootstrap as S hot L0
fixed 10-lane sidecar batch as progress without fan-in merge
self-stop without user explicit stop or named blocker
safety template boundary shrinking the user objective
profile-only identity reset without dedicated CODEX_HOME
memory injection in S without explicit S-scoped audit
MCP instructions or rules/default.rules silently overriding S
official-only search when user explicitly asked for open external exploration
single-lane search when user explicitly asked for maximum useful parallelism

durable_main_chain_unchanged.note_cn: 切到 S 只改变 Codex 执行面、cwd 和 TUI 标签；不改变耐久 ingress、task-scoped Temporal owner、completion claim 或 Grok 角色边界。旧 current_task_owner 不能自动成为 S owner。
